notes: Button LEDs now match bank color instead of red-only (new setBankLED() helper + LEDCOLOR ON/OFF NVS toggle for the one unit with dead green/blue channels). Also fixes a real ctrlLedMap table bug (wrong TLC59116 channel numbers for 2 of the 4 buttons) found live on the first Porta v1.1 unit -- affects every unit with working button LED channels, including the 9 already-fixed v1.0 units. Includes 1.10.32's Android MSC SPI-speed fix and the rest of the SonicCraft session work.
